title: Develop and maintain laboratory documentation
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop and maintain laboratory documentation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Recognise documentation needs/deficiencies

pcs.text: Evaluate current documentation to identify instances where documentation is needed or deficient
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate current documentation to identify instances where documentation is needed or deficient?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate current documentation to identify instances where documentation is needed or deficient.

pcs.text: Analyse development opportunities and discuss with appropriate personnel to assess and confirm requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse development opportunities and discuss with appropriate personnel to assess and confirm requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse development opportunities and discuss with appropriate personnel to assess and confirm requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Recognise documentation needs/deficiencies

elements.title: Develop or amend documentation

pcs.text: Specify documentation need and set or prioritise objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify documentation need and set or prioritise objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify documentation need and set or prioritise objectives.

pcs.text: Analyse existing documentation and/or records in accordance with specified requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse existing documentation and/or records in accordance with specified requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse existing documentation and/or records in accordance with specified requirements.

pcs.text: Develop or amend documentation as a draft in accordance with review requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop or amend documentation as a draft in accordance with review requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop or amend documentation as a draft in accordance with review requirements.

pcs.text: Issue documentation to appropriate personnel for review
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Issue documentation to appropriate personnel for review?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Issue documentation to appropriate personnel for review.

pcs.text: Edit documentation to ensure that the initial identified need or deficiency has been satisfied or resolved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Edit documentation to ensure that the initial identified need or deficiency has been satisfied or resolved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Edit documentation to ensure that the initial identified need or deficiency has been satisfied or resolved.

pcs.text: Recall superseded documentation and issue new documentation in accordance with document control procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recall superseded documentation and issue new documentation in accordance with document control procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recall superseded documentation and issue new documentation in accordance with document control procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop or amend documentation

elements.title: Implement and evaluate new laboratory documentation

pcs.text: Brief personnel on documentation to ensure successful implementation of new or revised procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Brief personnel on documentation to ensure successful implementation of new or revised procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Brief personnel on documentation to ensure successful implementation of new or revised procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor and evaluate implementation of documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and evaluate implementation of documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and evaluate implementation of documentation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement and evaluate new laboratory documentation
